phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the cathedral opens
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure ouvre la cathédrale ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UR OOV-ruh lah kah-tay-DRAHL
phrases.cultural_note: The cathedral is free to enter.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a cloister to visit
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'il y a un cloître à visiter ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess keel ee ah uhn KLWAT-ruh ah vee-zee-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: The Cloître de la Psalette is adjacent to the cathedral. A separate ticket is needed.

responses.english: Yes, the Psalette cloister. Entry is paid.
responses.phonetic: wee luh KLWAT-ruh duh lah psah-LET lahn-TRAY eh pay-YAHNT
responses.local: Oui, le cloître de la Psalette. L'entrée est payante.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cloister of La Psalette is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le cloître de la Psalette ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV luh KLWA-truh duh lah psah-LET
phrases.cultural_note: La Psalette is the name of the cathedral's Gothic cloister, located on the north side. It served as the residence of the canons and is open for visits.

responses.english: Through the small door, to the right of the cathedral.
responses.phonetic: par lah puh-TEET PORT ah DRWAHT duh lah kah-tay-DRAHL
responses.local: Par la petite porte, à droite de la cathédrale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are organ concerts during the summer
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des concerts d'orgue pendant l'été ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL day kon-SAIR DOR-guh pahn-DAHN lay-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: The cathedral hosts regular organ recitals in summer. The grand organ dates from the 17th century and has been restored several times.

responses.english: You need to check the programme on the website.
responses.phonetic: eel foh vay-ree-FYAY luh proh-GRAM soor luh SEET
responses.local: Il faut vérifier le programme sur le site.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photography is allowed inside
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'on peut prendre des photos à l'intérieur ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess kohn PUH PRAHN-druh day foh-TOH ah lahn-tay-RYUR
phrases.cultural_note: Photography without flash is generally permitted in French cathedrals.
